Notes: This drawing is the property of SIJCON and not to be copied or used without our permission.
Contains critical differences between drawing-based values and source documents requiring review.
Plant Building (FG): Building Width: Source (SPEC): 46.46 m (out-to-out) | Drawing-based: 46.46 m (out-to-out). Status: VERIFIED. Source and drawing values are a direct match.
Plant Building (FG): Building Length: Source (SPEC): 159.46 m (out-to-out) | Drawing-based: 159.46 m (out-to-out). Status: VERIFIED. Source and drawing values are a direct match.

Plant Building (FG): Eave Height (m): Source (SPEC): Specifies 10.0m, 33.0m, and 7.5m at different grid locations. | Drawing-based: Multiple conflicting heights identified (e.g., 19.0m, 33.0m, 7.5m).. Status: INCONSISTENT. Source and drawing values are inconsistent and internally conflicting. Reconciliation was not possible.

Plant Building (FG): Bay Spacing: Source (SPEC): 'As per Drawing' | Drawing-based: 1@7.115 + 5@8.700 + 1@10.300 + 2@8.700 + 1@11.200 + 6@8.700 + 1@8.815 m. Status: INCONSISTENT. Source defers to drawing, but the sum of drawing-based bay spacings (150.53 m) does not match the overall building length (159.23 m c/c).

Plant Building (FG): Framed Openings: Source (SPEC) specifies 'Framed opening with Supporting structure' for rolling shutters without dimensions. | Drawing-based values (MULTIPLE): |   - Rolling Shutter (RS): 6000x6000 mm (Qty: 7) - VERIFIED |   - Rolling Shutter (RS1): 4000x6000 mm (Qty: 1) - VERIFIED |   - Rolling Shutter (RS2): 9000x6000 mm (Qty: 1) - VERIFIED |   - Rolling Shutter (RS3): 5000x6000 mm (Qty: 1) - VERIFIED |   - Window (W): 2000x1400 mm (Qty: 17) - VERIFIED |   - Door (D): 1200x2300 mm (Qty: 1) - VERIFIED |   - Emergency Door (ED): 1200x2300 mm (Qty: 2) - VERIFIED. Status: MULTIPLE. Multiple valid instances identified from drawings. The source document specifies intent for rolling shutters but does not provide dimensions, quantities, or details for other opening types.

RM Building: Building Width: Source (SPEC): 50.00 m (out-to-out) | Drawing-based: 30.00 m (out-to-out). Status: INCONSISTENT. Direct conflict between source document value and consistently measured drawing value. Reconciliation was not possible.

RM Building: Building Length: Source (SPEC): 50.00 m (c/c) | Final Value (Drawing-based): 49.77 m (center-to-center). Status: VERIFIED. The drawing-based value of 49.77 m (c/c) was adopted as it is consistent with the source value of 50.00 m (c/c) within tolerance.

RM Building: Eave Height (m): Source (SPEC): Specifies 10.00 m and 33.00 m at different locations. | Drawing-based: Consistently shows 10.00 m only.. Status: INCONSISTENT. Conflict of scope. Drawings do not show the 33.00 m eave height specified in the source document.

RM Building: Bay Spacing: Source (SPEC): 'As per Drawing' | Final Value (Drawing-based): 1@5.984 + 4@6.100 + 1@7.000 + 2@6.193 m. Status: DERIVED. Source defers to drawing. Spacings are derived from drawings and are internally consistent with the building length.

Plant Building (FG): Eave Height: Source document specifies multiple eave heights (10.0m, 33.0m, 7.5m). Drawings show different and conflicting values (e.g., 19.0m, 33.0m, 7.5m). Impact: Clarification required on correct eave heights and locations.

Plant Building (FG): Bay Spacing: The sum of bay spacings shown on the drawing (150.53 m) is inconsistent with the overall building length shown on the same drawing (159.23 m c/c). Impact: Confirmation required for correct bay spacing dimensions.
RM Building: Width: Source document specifies a width of 50.00 m. Drawings consistently show a width of 30.00 m. Impact: Confirmation required for correct building width.

RM Building: Eave Height: Source document specifies two eave heights (10.0 m and 33.0 m). Drawings consistently show only the 10.0 m eave height. Impact: Confirmation required on scope for the 33.0 m eave height.
Values are based on drawing interpretations that conflict with source documents. User verification is advised.
